pinpoint.inapptemplate.Content.Docs: An object that contains information about the content of an in-app message, including its title and body text, text colors, background colors, images, buttons, and behaviors.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.CustomConfig.Docs: Custom data, in the form of key-value pairs, that is included in an in-app messaging payload.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.Layout.Docs: A string that determines the appearance of the in-app message. You can specify one of the following:  + `BOTTOM_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner at the bottom of the page.+ `TOP_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner at the top of the page.+ `OVERLAYS` – a message that covers entire screen.+ `MOBILE_FEED` – a message that appears in a window in front of the page.+ `MIDDLE_BANNER` – a message that appears as a banner in the middle of the page.+ `CAROUSEL` – a scrollable layout of up to five unique messages.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.Tags.Docs: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).

pinpoint.inapptemplate.TemplateDescripti.Docs: An optional description of the in-app template.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.TemplateName.Docs: The name of the in-app message template.
